seo.description: Updates, seasonal atmosphere and stories from ArdenNest. Discover what's happening at our holiday home in the Ardennes.

heading: Journal
subtitle: Moments, updates and seasonal atmosphere — occasionally, when it matters.
emptyState: Our first moments will appear here soon.

welkom-bij-ardennest.title: Welcome to ArdenNest
welkom-bij-ardennest.excerpt: A farmhouse from 1849, converted into a group house for 26 people. Discover what makes ArdenNest special.
welkom-bij-ardennest.videoCaption: ArdenNest — Quiet luxury for moments together
welkom-bij-ardennest.body:
A farmhouse from 1849, converted into a group house for 26 people. Nine bedrooms, each with its own bathroom. A professional kitchen with a Lacanche range cooker and two Miele dishwashers. And one oak table of 7m20 where everyone sits together — no separate kids' table, no two rooms.
We are Bieke and Christophe, and we've lived here for 25 years. Everything you see was built from one question: what does a large group truly need? The answer was always the same — space to be together, without hassle.
Two hectares of garden where children disappear for hours. A game room with a pool table and foosball. A covered play barn for the little ones. And inside: a living room where after dinner you naturally end up in smaller groups — by the fireplace, at the games table, with a glass of wine and a view of the garden.
No swimming pool, no sauna. But quality you can feel, from the De Witte Lietaer bed linen to the chairs you're happy to stay in long after dessert.
This is ArdenNest. Your nest in the Ardennes.
